Add pagination: show first page (50 results), load more on scroll-to-bottom or 'Load more' button. Reduces reactive overhead dramatically.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"claudeuser@example.com","created_at":"2026-02-14T09:11:24Z","created_by":"Claude Sandbox","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:11:57Z"}

{"id":"tauri-eftv","title":"Backend: Optimize content search (ripgrep) performance","description":"Improve content_search.rs: 1) Enable memory-mapped I/O in Searcher for faster file reads, 2) Use entry.file_type() instead of path.is_dir() to avoid stat syscalls, 3) Reuse Searcher per thread, 4) Emit first batch sooner (16ms then 100ms), 5) Use RegexMatcher::new instead of new_line_matcher for case-insensitive.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"claudeuser@example.com","created_at":"2026-02-14T09:11:14Z","created_by":"Claude Sandbox","updated_at":"2026-02-14T09:11:59Z"}

new_value: Migrated all remaining state modules (focused-window, theme, drag) to use loadPersisted/savePersisted/removePersisted from persisted.ts. Added removePersisted() for key deletion. All 188 unit tests pass. No raw localStorage access remains outside persisted.ts.

old_value: {"id":"tauri-explorer-gmpb","title":"Add Material Design file icons using Nerd Font glyphs","description":"Add a 'Material' icon theme option alongside the current SVG icons. Use the Symbols Nerd Font to render file-type-specific glyphs (like yazi does). Map file extensions to Nerd Font codepoints with per-type colors. Add a setting to toggle between 'Default' (current SVG) and 'Material' (Nerd Font) icon themes. This is a concrete first step toward tauri-jsn1.4 (swappable icon theme system).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"claudeuser@example.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T04:37:27Z","created_by":"Claude User","updated_at":"2026-03-05T04:37:27Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Add a 'Material' icon theme option alongside the current SVG icons. Use the Symbols Nerd Font to render file-type-specific glyphs (like yazi does). new_value: Implemented Material icon theme using Nerd Font glyphs. Bundled SymbolsNerdFont-Regular.ttf, created nerd-icons.ts with 100+ extension mappings and special filename overrides, added iconTheme setting with UI toggle in Settings > Appearance. All 188 unit tests and 114 E2E tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"tauri-explorer-raqn","title":"Make address bar visually prominent","description":"The breadcrumbs/address bar blends into the background on dark themes. It uses var(--control-fill) and var(--control-stroke) which are too subtle. Give it more visual weight: brighter background, more visible border, and better contrast so it reads as the primary navigation element.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"claudeuser@example.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T06:59:04Z","created_by":"Claude User","updated_at":"2026-03-05T06:59:04Z"}

new_value: Added dedicated --address-bar-* CSS tokens with brighter background (12% vs 7%), stronger border (18% vs 10%), inset highlight for depth, and enhanced hover states. Theme-specific values for light/dark, fallbacks for others. 114 E2E tests pass.

new_value: Extension labels now rendered as prominent text on code and default document icons in tiles view. Font size adapts to label length.
Added subtle radial gradient vignette to content area via --content-bg CSS variable. Custom tints for dark, hacker, and ocean-blue themes.
Set caret-color to accent color for clear visibility in the path input.
